titlestmt.titleproper: Guide to the Collection of Erotic Fiction Reader Pamphlets
Collection of erotic fiction reader pamphlets
titlestmt.author: Tina Evans

publicationstmt.publisher: Beinecke Rare Book and Manuscript Library

maintenanceagency.agencyname: Beinecke Rare Book and Manuscript Library

descriptivenote.p: Finding aid description and metadata in Archives at Yale are licensed under a CC0 1.0 Universal (CC0 1.0) Public Domain Dedication. This means that anyone may copy, modify, and distribute this descriptive metadata without restriction or permission. The CC0 license is explained in full on the Creative Commons website: CC0 1.0 Universal (CC0 1.0) Public Domain Dedication. More information is available on our Help page.

maintenanceevent.eventdescription: This finding aid was produced using ArchivesSpace on Tuesday June 4, 2024 at 03:00

did.unittitle: Collection of erotic fiction reader pamphlets

corpname.part: Beinecke Rare Book and Manuscript Library

accessrestrict.head: Conditions Governing Access
accessrestrict.p: This collection is open for research

acqinfo.head: Immediate Source of Acquisition
acqinfo.p: Purchased from Between the Covers on the Edwin J. Beinecke Book Fund, 2019.

arrangement.head: Arrangement
arrangement.p: Materials in this collection are arranged alphabetically by title.

bioghist.head: Biographical / Historical
bioghist.p: The erotic fiction "reader" pamphlets in this collection were published circa 1930s by numerous different entities. While a "publisher" is indicated on many of the pamphlets, actual verifiable publication information - including author and publisher - is scant and suspect at best.

prefercite.head: Preferred Citation
prefercite.p: Collection of Erotic Fiction Reader Pamphlets. General Collection, Beinecke Rare Book and Manuscript Library, Yale University.

processinfo.head: Processing Information
processinfo.p: Collections are processed to a variety of levels, depending on the work necessary to make them usable, their perceived research value, the availability of staff, competing priorities, and whether or not further accruals are expected. The library attempts to provide a basic level of preservation and access for all collections, and does more extensive processing of higher priority collections as time and resources permit.

scopecontent.head: Content Description
scopecontent.p: This collection contains one hundred forty-five erotic fiction "reader" pamphlets, produced by multiple publishers.

userestrict.head: Conditions Governing Use
userestrict.p: The Collection of Erotic Fiction Reader Pamphlets is the physical property of the Beinecke Rare Book and Manuscript Library, Yale University. Literary rights, including copyright, belong to the authors or their legal heirs and assigns. For further information consult the appropriate curator.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Printed by Contemporary Press, Paris, France.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Printed by the Contemporary Press, Paris, France. Two copies are present in folder.
